emergency_definition: no AC when it's over 95 degrees
heat pump failure for elderly customers
emergency_fallback: we'll call back in 15 minutes and to call 911 if there's a gas smell
non_emergency_routing_rules: take a message, handle it next business day, unless within 1 hour of opening then flag it as urgent in the notes
integration_constraints: don't schedule commercial HVAC jobs automatically in ServiceTitan
log commercial jobs in both ServiceTitan and FieldPulse
after_hours_flow_summary: offer emergency service, take non-emergency messages for next business day
notes: be polite but efficient, don't chit-chat too long, never quote prices on the phone
